@@ -256,6 +262,48 @@ namespace mRemoteNG.Config.Connections

+        /// <summary>
+        /// Checks if a SQL exception indicates the user has read-only access
+        /// to the database (server-level permission denial, not the checkbox).
+        /// </summary>
+        private static bool IsReadOnlyPermissionError(Exception ex)
+        {
+            // Walk the exception chain (including InnerException) looking for
+            // database-specific permission/read-only error codes.
+            Exception? current = ex;
+            while (current != null)
+            {
+                // MS SQL Server: error 229 = permission denied, 3906 = read-only database
+                if (current is Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlException sqlEx)
+                {
+                    foreach (Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlError error in sqlEx.Errors)
+                    {
+                        if (error.Number is 229 or 3906)
+                            return true;
+                    }
+                }
+
+                // MySQL: error 1142 = permission denied, 1290 = read-only mode
+                if (current is MySql.Data.MySqlClient.MySqlException mySqlEx)
+                {
+                    if (mySqlEx.Number is 1142 or 1290)
+                        return true;
+                }
+
+                // Generic fallback: check message for common permission-denied patterns
+                string msg = current.Message;
+                if (msg.Contains("READ ONLY", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
+                    msg.Contains("permission", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) && msg.Contains("denied", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
+                {
+                    return true;
+                }
+
+                current = current.InnerException;
+            }
+
+            return false;
+        }
+

         {
             return Properties.OptionsDBsPage.Default.SQLReadOnly;
